themes.label: Trading Issues
themes.description: Reviews related to problems with trading, such as glitches, delayed executions, and incorrect pricing. These issues lead to financial losses and frustration for users.

themes.label: App Performance
themes.description: Reviews discussing the app's performance, including lag, crashes, and unresponsiveness. These issues hinder the user experience and make it difficult to use the app effectively.

themes.label: Feature Requests
themes.description: Reviews suggesting new features or improvements to existing ones, such as adding more technical indicators, custom portfolio splits, or trailing stop-loss. These requests aim to enhance the user experience and provide more functionality.

2. App Performance (43 reviews)
   Reviews discussing the app's performance, including lag, crashes, and unresponsiveness. These issues hinder the user experience and make it difficult to use the app effectively.

3. Feature Requests (43 reviews)
   Reviews suggesting new features or improvements to existing ones, such as adding more technical indicators, custom portfolio splits, or trailing stop-loss. These requests aim to enhance the user experience and provide more functionality.
